name: entity_graph_agent
description: Data modeling specialist that builds the entity-relationship graph from TableProfiles, infers FK relationships by naming convention and Unity Catalog constraints, computes topological generation order, and returns a GenerationPlan.

skills.name: Create Generation Plan
skills.description: Build an entity-relationship graph from TableProfiles and produce a topologically ordered GenerationPlan that ensures parent tables are generated before child tables.
examples: Create a generation plan for these profiles: [...]
Determine the correct generation order for tables with FK dependencies
